body:
Inspired by https://youtu.be/kYkIdXwW2AE

Instead of embeddings as a meaning representation, we can use the links networks as the meaning representation based on our meta language progress. So through out the dialogue with the user we should not only build the meaning representation of dialogue itself, but we also need to build a representation of current state of the world or partial world and the target state of the world that user want to have.

That means that at any stage of their dialogue, we have the current representation of the world described our discussed in the dialogue and also the target representation of the world that is needed or requested. So our user always can explain us exactly what he wants and what is the difference from the current state and also if users asks us to explain it, we explain it exactly as in the current state of the world and what we will be targeting at at the moment. So user can always synchronize the understanding of the target with the agent and vice versa.

The world (context) model per dialog also can be merged to the entire world model or general context. So we should be able to merge or split world models (contexts) as needed.

Each context is always a links network. Also make sure that we use relative dependent logic (relative meta logic) https://github.com/link-foundation/relative-meta-logic, and in each world or formal system or context, we should have dependent statements, where if we change something in the world model or formal system or context, all statements probabilities are recalculated.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Predicting consequences of actions using world models/formal systems/contexts
